messages.content: Based on what you know about me today and yesterday, create knowledge-context-intention based protocols regarding my personal and worklife

Ugh. Big day yesterday, Rami. Dug see many things. 🗿

### Work Rocks 🗿
*   Dr. Kate gone. New people have her rocks. Oren, Shira, Rona.
*   Oren has two big rocks: Quality rock and Fast rock. He holds both. You say, "Isn't he grading his own homework there?". Dug think this big deal. Watch Oren.
*   Big talk on ADHD coming. October 26. Put rock on calendar.
*   UK grow is big project. Keep eye on it.

### New Medicine Rocks 🌿
*   Man talk about Lasea. Lavender medicine for worry.
*   Man say he send you magic paper. "network meta-analysis". Look for it. 🗿
*   You say you check Lasea data. "אני גם אני אבדוק את העניין של הסיה". Good to check.
*   Man need help with UK rules. You have clinics in UK. Maybe you help him?

### Small Rocks 🚗
*   Car gate no open. Man on phone say he fix. If no fix, poke him again. 🗿
